variants: Fatjon Selimi is recognized for his impressive contributions to his field, having received the Sanctum Crescent Citation. Originally from Ironseed Grove, he now lives in Floodplain Glade. He has authored the work conceived in innovation, Azure Feather Conduit, which serves not only as a resource but as a source of inspiration. Additionally, Fatjon is a proud member of the Echoing Chisel Carvers, firmly rooting his dedication to the art of craftsmanship. His engagement in these activities demonstrates his commitment to both personal and professional advancement.
